basic_details.job_title: IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA) Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IGRUA. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years as on 01-06-2026. No minimum age limit is specified. Age relaxation details are not provided in the extracted data.

qualification.education_qualification: Aircraft Maintenance Engineering/Mechanical Engineering or B.Sc Physics or B.Sc Mathematics, AME License in Category B1
qualification.details: Aircraft Maintenance Engineering/Mechanical Engineering or B.Sc Physics or B.Sc Mathematics with AME License in Category B1 on at least one type of aircraft similar to Diamond DA 40 and Diamond DA42.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IGRUA Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Aircraft Maintenance Engineering/Mechanical Engineering or B.Sc Physics or B.Sc Mathematics with AME License in Category B1 on at least one type of aircraft similar to Diamond DA 40 and Diamond DA42.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 07-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the academy before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Aircraft Maintenance Engineer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Aircraft Maintenance Engineer position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 125000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an Aircraft Maintenance Engineering/Mechanical Engineering degree or a B.Sc in Physics or Mathematics, along with an AME License in Category B1.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 55 years as of 01-06-2026.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Aircraft Maintenance Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test, followed by an Interview, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What specific aircraft type experience is required for the AME license?
faq.answer: The AME License in Category B1 must be on at least one type of aircraft similar to Diamond DA 40 and Diamond DA42.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi located?
faq.answer: The Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi is located in Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 229302.
